name: Christian Decker
cooked: I don’t have anything smart to say, but I wanted to thank you for pushing forward with this research. I had mostly given up on APO or any other combination of opcodes landing, so seeing this moving again is amazing. Thank you so much
topic_title: Eltoo State Chain on Signet: Three Rounds, Six Transactions (APO + CTV)
